TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_api
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau stangi ya yau u ya lazat a yau.
S.PHON: jau staŋi ja jau u ja raz~rat a jau.
S.FORM: yau stangi ya yau u ya lazat a yau.
S.PHON: jau staŋi ja jau u ja raz~rat a jau.

S.FORM: matiw mkyala matiw ta nipadumaanna tu byabas.
S.PHON: matiw mkjara matiw ta nipaɮumaanna tu βjaβas.
S.FORM: matiw mkyala matiw ta nipadumaanna tu byabas.
S.PHON: matiw mkjara matiw ta nipaɮumaanna tu βjaβas.

TRANSL.notes: (他)去摘…去種芭樂的地方.
(He) went to pluck…went to where he planted guavas.

S.TRANSL: went to pluck…went to where he planted guavas.

S.FORM: mkyala tu byabas baqian aizipna.
S.PHON: mkjara tu βjaβas βaqian aiz~ripna.
S.FORM: mkyala tu byabas baqian aizipna.
S.PHON: mkjara tu βjaβas βaqian aiz~ripna.

S.FORM: yau tangi yauti ya sunisna.
S.PHON: jau taŋi jauti ja sunisna.
S.FORM: yau tangi yauti ya sunisna.
S.PHON: jau taŋi jauti ja sunisna.
S.TRANSL: 等一下他的小孩子有來.

S.FORM: yauti ya sunisna nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunisna nani.
S.FORM: yauti ya sunisna nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunisna nani.

S.FORM: yauti pangmuanna sunisna sepez taqeRawasan tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: jauti paŋmuanna sunisna səpəz~r taqəʁawasan tu βjaβas nani.
S.FORM: yauti pangmuanna sunisna sepez taqeRawasan tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: jauti paŋmuanna sunisna səpəz~r taqəʁawasan tu βjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的小孩子有幫忙把芭樂放到籃子裡.
His child helped put the guavas into the basket.

S.FORM: puniRti ya qeRawasna ya qibina nani.
S.PHON: puniʁti ja qəʁawasna ja qiβina nani.
S.FORM: puniRti ya qeRawasna ya qibina nani.
S.PHON: puniʁti ja qəʁawasna ja qiβina nani.

S.FORM: qu puniRti ya qeRawasta.
S.PHON: qu puniʁti ja qəʁawasta.
S.FORM: qu puniRti ya qeRawasta.
S.PHON: qu puniʁti ja qəʁawasta.
S.TRANSL: It's good that our basket was full.

S.FORM: yau situngawakita zinna saiza.
S.PHON: jau situŋawakita z~rinna saiz~ra.
S.FORM: yau situngawakita zinna saiza.
S.PHON: jau situŋawakita z~rinna saiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 他們可能想說我們要把芭樂送去.

TRANSL.notes: 'Let's send (the guavas to somewhere),' said they perhaps.

S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani βaqian a jau nani.
S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani βaqian a jau nani.

S.FORM: wiyati mzaqis mzaqispaita tababaw si.
S.PHON: wijati mz~raqis mz~raqispaita taβaβaw si.
S.FORM: wiyati mzaqis mzaqispaita tababaw si.
S.PHON: wijati mz~raqis mz~raqispaita taβaβaw si.
S.TRANSL: We're going to climb to the top.

S.FORM: tuRangpaita uman.
S.PHON: tuʁaŋpaita uman.
S.FORM: tuRangpaita uman.
S.PHON: tuʁaŋpaita uman.

TRANSL.notes: 我們要再(把籃子)裝滿.
We're going to fill (the basket) again.

S.FORM: sapuniRanta taq taqeRawas a zau zinna saiza nani.
S.PHON: sapuniʁanta taq taqəʁawas a z~rau z~rinna saiz~ra nani.
S.FORM: sapuniRanta taq taqeRawas a zau zinna saiza nani.
S.PHON: sapuniʁanta taq taqəʁawas a z~rau z~rinna saiz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想說我們要把籃子裝滿.
'We're going to fill the basket,' he thought perhaps.

S.FORM: wiyati tim e mzaqis nani.
S.PHON: wijati tim ə mz~raqis nani.
S.FORM: wiyati tim e mzaqis nani.
S.PHON: wijati tim ə mz~raqis nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他)上去.
(He) climbed up.

S.FORM: wani sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: wani sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani sunis a jau nani.

S.FORM: tmungawti tungawakita qenyaalata zinna.
S.PHON: tmuŋawti tuŋawakita qənjaarata z~rinna.
S.FORM: tmungawti tungawakita qenyaalata zinna.
S.PHON: tmuŋawti tuŋawakita qənjaarata z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 他說,我們要把我們所拿的送去.

TRANSL.notes: 'Let's send what we took (to somewhere),' said he.

S.TRANSL: 'Let's send what we took ,' said he.

S.FORM: mzaqis tu pizianna ta taizaan u taqitunan.
S.PHON: mz~raqis tu piz~rianna ta taiz~raan u taqitunan.
S.FORM: mzaqis tu pizianna ta taizaan u taqitunan.
S.PHON: mz~raqis tu piz~rianna ta taiz~raan u taqitunan.

TRANSL.notes: 他(把籃子)放到車子上面.
He put (the baskets) onto something ... onto the bicycle.

S.TRANSL: He put onto something ... onto the bicycle.

S.FORM: tmungaw tmungaw naquni smani nipasaqayna nani suRawti ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tmuŋaw tmuŋaw naquni smani nipasaqajna nani suʁawti ja sunis a jau.
S.FORM: tmungaw tmungaw naquni smani nipasaqayna nani suRawti ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tmuŋaw tmuŋaw naquni smani nipasaqajna nani suʁawti ja sunis a jau.

TRANSL.notes: 他去送(芭樂),不知怎麼地,那個小孩騎車的時候跌倒了.

S.TRANSL: 他去送 ,不知怎麼地,那個小孩騎車的時候跌倒了.

TRANSL.notes: He sent (the guavas to somewhere), but somehow the child fell down while riding.

S.TRANSL: He sent , but somehow the child fell down while riding.

S.FORM: pyaquduti ya byabas a yau mniz nani.
S.PHON: pjaquɮuti ja βjaβas a jau mniz~r nani.
S.FORM: pyaquduti ya byabas a yau mniz nani.
S.PHON: pjaquɮuti ja βjaβas a jau mniz~r nani.
S.TRANSL: 全部的芭樂都散落一地.
All the guavas were scattered all over.

S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau mespes ta nunuqna ta.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau məspəs ta nunuqna ta.
S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau mespes ta nunuqna ta.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau məspəs ta nunuqna ta.
S.TRANSL: 小孩按摩自己的小腿骨頭處.
The child stroked the bone of his shank.

S.FORM: nayau saiza tiquqanna na 'nay qitunna muni smani.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ra tiquqanna na ʔnaj qitunna muni smani.
S.FORM: nayau saiza tiquqanna na 'nay qitunna muni smani.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ra tiquqanna na ʔnaj qitunna muni smani.
S.TRANSL: I don't know what hit him.

S.FORM: nani yauti ya 'daq 'daqna.
S.PHON: nani jauti ja ʔɮaq ʔɮaqna.
S.FORM: nani yauti ya 'daq 'daqna.
S.PHON: nani jauti ja ʔɮaq ʔɮaqna.

S.FORM: pangmuannati na 'daqna smapun pizi ta qeRawasan nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuannati na ʔɮaqna smapun piz~ri ta qəʁawasan nani.
S.FORM: pangmuannati na 'daqna smapun pizi ta qeRawasan nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuannati na ʔɮaqna smapun piz~ri ta qəʁawasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友幫忙撿,放到籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: His friends helped pick up (the guavas) and put (them) into the basket.

S.TRANSL: His friends helped pick up and put into the basket.

S.FORM: sepezannati uman ta izaan u ta qitunanna tazitinsiyaanna nani.
S.PHON: səpəz~rannati uman ta iz~raan u ta qitunanna taz~ritinsijaanna nani.
S.FORM: sepezannati uman ta izaan u ta qitunanna tazitinsiyaanna nani.
S.PHON: səpəz~rannati uman ta iz~raan u ta qitunanna taz~ritinsijaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們又把籃子放到那個 ... 放到車子上,到腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: They put (the basket) onto something ... onto his vehicle, onto his bicycle again.

S.TRANSL: They put onto something ... onto his vehicle, onto his bicycle again.

S.FORM: pun nani wiyati tungawanna.
S.PHON: pun nani wijati tuŋawanna.
S.FORM: pun nani wiyati tungawanna.
S.PHON: pun nani wijati tuŋawanna.

TRANSL.notes: 好了就去送(芭樂).
Later (when it was finished), he sent (the guavas to somewhere).

S.FORM: timu smaqay ya sunis a yau XXXX tmibuqti ya qubuna nani.
S.PHON: timu smaqaj ja sunis a jau **** tmiβuqti ja quβuna nani.
S.FORM: timu smaqay ya sunis a yau XXXX tmibuqti ya qubuna nani.
S.PHON: timu smaqaj ja sunis a jau **** tmiβuqti ja quβuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果小孩走掉後,他的帽子掉了下來.
It turned out that when the child went away, his hat fell down.

S.FORM: azkaw tmibuqti ya qubuta nani wiyati sunis a yau.
S.PHON: az~rkaw tmiβuqti ja quβuta nani wijati sunis a jau.
S.FORM: azkaw tmibuqti ya qubuta nani wiyati sunis a yau.
S.PHON: az~rkaw tmiβuqti ja quβuta nani wijati sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 唉呦, 我們的帽子掉下去了.小孩子走掉了.
Alas, our hat fell down. The child left.

S.FORM: wani kaputna nani qu alaakita qubuna tmibuq alaannati na su na 'daqna ya qubu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani kaputna nani qu araakita quβuna tmiβuq araannati na su na ʔɮaqna ja quβu a jau nani.
S.FORM: wani kaputna nani qu alaakita qubuna tmibuq alaannati na su na 'daqna ya qubu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wani kaputna nani qu araakita quβuna tmiβuq araannati na su na ʔɮaqna ja quβu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們去拿他的帽子.他的朋友去拿他的帽子.
Let's take his hat. His fiends took the hat.

S.FORM: syazi ta tasnaqayna nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri ta tasnaqajna nani.
S.FORM: syazi ta tasnaqayna nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri ta tasnaqajna nani.

S.FORM: niwusannati na sunis a yau na paqitun tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: niwusannati na sunis a jau na paqitun tu βjaβas nani.
S.FORM: niwusannati na sunis a yau na paqitun tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: niwusannati na sunis a jau na paqitun tu βjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們叫那個騎單車載芭樂的人.
They whistled the child who rode the bike with guavas.

S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau tmungaw tu qubuna na.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau tmuŋaw tu quβuna na.
S.FORM: yauti ya sunis a yau tmungaw tu qubuna na.
S.PHON: jauti ja sunis a jau tmuŋaw tu quβuna na.

S.FORM: pwasaanna tu uzusa tu byabas zinna.
S.PHON: pwasaanna tu uz~rusa tu βjaβas z~rinna.
S.FORM: pwasaanna tu uzusa tu byabas zinna.
S.PHON: pwasaanna tu uz~rusa tu βjaβas z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: He gave them two guavas in return.

S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani XXXX pun nani tmadikudti ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: wani βaqian a jau nani **** pun nani tmaɮikuɮti ja sunis a jau.
S.FORM: wani baqian a yau nani XXXX pun nani tmadikudti ya sunis a yau.
S.PHON: wani βaqian a jau nani **** pun nani tmaɮikuɮti ja sunis a jau.

S.FORM: maiiku tmayta tmadikud.
S.PHON: maiiku tmajta tmaɮikuɮ.
S.FORM: maiiku tmayta tmadikud.
S.PHON: maiiku tmajta tmaɮikuɮ.

TRANSL.notes: (老人說), 我沒看到他回頭.
'I didn't see him turn round,' (said the elder).

S.FORM: pun nani yauti ya XXXX baqian yau smaRuR.
S.PHON: pun nani jauti ja **** βaqian jau smaʁuʁ.
S.FORM: pun nani yauti ya XXXX baqian yau smaRuR.
S.PHON: pun nani jauti ja **** βaqian jau smaʁuʁ.

S.FORM: tmayta tu peniqeRawasna.
S.PHON: tmajta tu pəniqəʁawasna.
S.FORM: tmayta tu peniqeRawasna.
S.PHON: tmajta tu pəniqəʁawasna.

TRANSL.notes: (老人家)看著他的籃子.
(The elder) looked at his baskets.

S.FORM: saqeRawasti ma nani yau ngatu.
S.PHON: saqəʁawasti ma nani jau ŋatu.
S.FORM: saqeRawasti ma nani yau ngatu.
S.PHON: saqəʁawasti ma nani jau ŋatu.

TRANSL.notes: 只剩一個滿滿的籃子還有一個裝一半的(籃子).

S.TRANSL: 只剩一個滿滿的籃子還有一個裝一半的 .
Only a full basket and a half.

S.FORM: zazaka.
S.PHON: z~raz~raka.
S.FORM: zazaka.
S.PHON: z~raz~raka.
